problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by activating at the molecular level.
